Notice Ofmotion And Motion To Compel Inspection Of Real Property And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-16-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Cathy Mosbrucker, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: Matthew Sweeney
Mike Tcheng, Atty. for Defendant and opposing party: Clare Feng

RULING: HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PLAINTIFF MATTHEW SWEENY, MAUREEN SWEENY's Motion To Compel Inspection Of Real Property is denied. The court does not find good cause for further inspection. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
